ideation: This sequence mimics a parrot's head movements and mimics the way a parrot might bob its head, or cock its head to one side in curiosity. The arms will mimic this motion. Frame 1 starts with both arms down. The second frame is where the robot cocks its head by tilting one arm upward and the other downward. The third frame is a return to neutral. The fourth frame mimics the head bobbing with the arms moving up and down in a slight bobbing motion. The fifth frame returns to the arms at rest. This creates a curious, playful animation.

frames.beat: arms hang at rest, a parrot's stillness
one arm tilts up, the other down, curious tilt
arms return to rest, surveying the scene
both arms bob slightly, a gentle head bob
arms settle back down, the parrot is content
